calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2018 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Continued To Feb-07-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Ann Dallman.

Ms. Stoneman stated that probate was just granted this morning for the deceased beneficiary and that they need to amend this petition to request distribution to the deceased beneficiaries estate. The Petition for First and Final Report of Executor, etc. is continued to February 7, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a response to the Probate Examiner's notes and for filing of an amendment to the petition.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Continued To Jan-08-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-17-2017 Continued To Dec-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-15-298529 Estate of Thomas F. Dallman and PES-17-301177 Estate of Peter R. Dallman.

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Ann Dallman.

Ms. Stoneman provided family history and stated that if the petition for spousal property is granted, she can close out the estate. Ms. Stoneman also stated that if it is not granted, she will proceed with probate. The Petition for First and Final Report of Executor, etc. and the Petition for Spousal Property are taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Aug-21-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Atatus Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-03-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Atatus Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Continued To Jul-03-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Stoneman for Ann Dallman (Executor).

Ms. Stoneman stated that her Client lost her Father and basically did not prioritize in providing information, that she has drafted 90% of the petition, that she is waiting to receive the Inventory and Appraisal back from the Referee, and that the Estate should then be ready to close. Status on close of estate is continued to July 3, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Tim Kneis. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Atatus Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Continued To May-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on May 17, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Inventory and Appraisal, a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration have not been filed. Status on close of the Estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2015 Continued To Oct-27-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Continued To Sep-29-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (petitioner) Ann Dallman.

The court stated that it will continue the matter so that the petition can be noticed as a 2nd amended and for time to publish. Ms. Stoneman stated that the decedent prepared a holographic will years ago with everything going to the nieces and nephews, that he filled out a Nolo Press will on the day he died leaving everything to his parents, that the parents intention is to give everything to the nieces and nephews and that an error was made in not putting amended on the notice. The Court stated that notice was insufficient and that not enough time was given. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to September 29, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado: Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-18-2015 Continued To Sep-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Continued To Aug-18-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Continued To Jul-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Continued To Jun-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Heather Stoneman for (Petitioner) Ann Dallman.

The Court stated that the petition for probate is not telling us what is being probated. Ms. Stoneman reported that the petition was filed with a holographic will, that they then located a previous will and that the heirs plan to gift according to the previous will. The Court stated that it does not have anything to suggest that the holographic will is not valid, that there is no petition to admit it, that there is not a petition seeking the admission of the earlier will, that they will need to file an amended petition seeking admission of one or the other and that it cannot appoint an administrator who does not know what he/she is administering. Ms. Stoneman stated that she may file a petition for special administration to handle any interim matters. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to June 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
